message:
fix: prevent double-translation of agent type in detectState and add case-insensitive bypass pattern

Bug 1: detectState() was translating agent type to short form ("cc") before
passing to determineState(), which does its own translation internally. This
caused HasIdlePattern() to receive "cc" but robot defaultPatterns use
Agent: "claude" (long form), so MatchByCategory skipped all Claude-specific
idle patterns. Remove the premature translation so determineState() receives
the long form and can use it correctly for both the status package (translated
internally) and the robot pattern library (long form).

Bug 2: The "bypass permissions on" pattern in robot defaultPatterns was
case-sensitive while the same pattern in agent/patterns.go and
status/patterns.go used (?i). Add (?i) for consistency.

Bug 3 (agent idle patterns): No change needed -- the agent package's
detectIdle() already limits matching to the last 5 lines via
getLastNLines(output, 5), mitigating false positives from mid-output matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
